meta.title: Oak | The Context Library for you and your agent
meta.description: Oak keeps everything you read in one place, then puts an AI research agent on top that searches and answers across all of it — with citations you can open.

hero.tagline: A research agent for everything you read.
hero.subhead: Keep everything you read in one place — then let an AI search and answer across all of it, with citations you can open.
hero.shotAlt: Oak's library switching between cover and list views

bento.title: Your sources, notes, and answers in one place.

library.title: Everything you read, one place
library.desc: Every PDF, paper, and web page in collections and tags — with full-text search that even understands 中日韩.
library.alt: Oak's library with collections, tags, and full-text search

aichat.title: Chat with what you're reading
aichat.desc: Attach a page or a selection and ask — Oak answers right beside the document, in context, with formatted notes, code, and rendered math.
aichat.alt: Oak answering a question about the open document, streamed in the side panel

translate.title: Translate inline, never break flow
translate.desc: Read any paper in your language right beside the original — sentence by sentence, no copy-paste, no tab-switching.
translate.alt: Oak's translation panel showing a paper in English and your language side by side

define.title: Go deep on any word
define.desc: Tap a word for a rich card — meaning, nuance, collocations, and a one-line gist — so nothing stays fuzzy.
define.alt: Oak's deep word card with core semantics and collocations

browse.title: The web, built in
browse.desc: Search, open a link, and read live pages with your logins intact — then save what matters to your library.
browse.alt: Oak's in-app browser reading a live web page

notes.title: Highlight, note, keep
notes.desc: Mark up any page and your notes collect in one panel — text and image clippings, searchable across everything you read.
notes.alt: Oak's Notes panel collecting highlights and image clippings from a paper

models.title: Use any model. Switch anytime.
models.subhead: The best brain for each question — from the frontier labs to a local model running on your Mac. Your choice, every time.
